## Type Of Change

- [ ] Frontend / UI
- [ ] Backend / server actions
- [ ] Prisma / database

- [ ] Reports / grading / analytics

## Verification

- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Other:

## Data, Security, And Deployment Notes

- [ ] No secrets, database URLs, auth tokens, generated PDFs, or private academic data are included.
- [ ] Workspace/role scope was considered for dashboard changes.
- [ ] Supabase/Prisma changes are documented and migration/manual SQL steps are clear.
- [ ] Generated files are excluded unless intentionally committed.

## Screenshots / Reports

Add screenshots, PDF previews, or report samples if this changes UI, charts, exports, or generated documents.
